text: Cold solder joint found on C12 cap. Supplier batch 44A.
C12 capacitor on control PCB has insufficent solder coverage.
Bridge betwen C12 terminals. Looks like too much flux from vendor.
C12 tomstoning after reflow. Check supplier lead finish.
Missing solder on one side of C12. SMT vendor issue reported.
C12 component shifted on pad. Solder paste apperance is poor from factory.
Excessive solder at C12 site. Supplier rework visible under scope.
Fractured solder joint on C12. Possible vibration fail during transit from sub-con.
C12 cap loose. Solder not wetting properly to the PCB pad.
Dry joint on C12. Supplier QA missed this one again.
Vibration test failed. Found loose screws at Line 1 station.
Under-torked screws on chassis. Calib. on driver might be off.
Assy Line 1: Screws backing out during vibe. Torque setting suspect.
Unit rattled during testing. M3 screws not tight enough at Assmbly L1.
Line 1 driver needs recalib. Screws under spec torque on 3 units.
Vibe fail. Screws on L1 assembly line are barely hand tight.
Loose hardware inside housing. Torque tool at L1 station is driftin.
Screws failed torque check post-vibration. Line 1 tool out of cal.
Small scratch on front plastic during boxing. Op error.
Serial sticker is blury and unreadable. Reprint needed.
Lable misaligned on back panel. Not centered properly.
Deep scratch near logo. Packaging op was using metal tool.
SN sticker peeling off. Operator didn't press down firm.
Misalined product label. 5deg tilt, looks bad.
Packaging damge. Box scuffed and label is upside down.
Plastic casing cracked near hinge. Material fatigue?
LED not lighting up. PCB power rail issue.
Wrong firmware ver. loaded on unit.
Fan making grinding noise. Replace part.
Input jack loose. Nut missing from inside.
Unit wont power on. Fuse blown immediately.
Paint bubble on top cover. Cosmetic reject.
USB port pins bent. Damage during insertion test.
Glue residue on screen. Needs cleaning station.
Keyboard key 'A' stuck. Mechanical fail.
Incorrect color box used for this model. Swap at packing.
Battery not charging. Cable internal short.
Smell of burning during burn-in test. Pull from line.
Screen flicker at high temp. Thermal issue.
Missing manual in the retail box. QA check failed.
